category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison.

title.en: China-to-Austria EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入奥地利：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入奧地利：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China EV charger documentation against Austria (ASI / E-Control / APG) and EU CE framework expectations, including IEC 61851, IEC 62196-2 Type 2 / CCS2 compatibility, electrical protection-device requirements, OVE electrotechnical rules, and national installation rules. Austria is landlocked; sea freight routes via Hamburg (Germany), Koper (Slovenia), or Trieste (Italy). German-language documentation is commonly required.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与奥地利（ASI / E-Control / APG）及欧盟CE框架要求对照，涵盖IEC 61851、IEC 62196-2 Type 2/CCS2兼容性、保护装置要求、OVE电工技术规则和国家安装规则。奥地利为内陆国，海运须经汉堡（德国）、科佩尔（斯洛文尼亚）或的里雅斯特（意大利）港口中转。通常亦须提供德语文件。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與奧地利（ASI / E-Control / APG）及歐盟CE框架要求對照，涵蓋IEC 61851、IEC 62196-2 Type 2/CCS2相容性、保護裝置要求、OVE電工技術規則和國家安裝規則。奧地利為內陸國，海運須經漢堡（德國）、科佩爾（斯洛維尼亞）或的里雅斯特（義大利）港口中轉。通常亦須提供德語文件。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, notified-body assessment, customs determination, electrical-installation design, grid-operator approval, or market-access approval. Exporters and installers should verify current Austria (ASI / E-Control / APG), OVE, and EU-CE requirements before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、公告机构评审、海关裁定、电气安装设计、并网或市场准入批准。出口商和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行奥地利（ASI / E-Control / APG）、OVE及欧盟CE相关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、公告機構評審、海關裁定、電氣安裝設計、併網或市場准入批准。出口商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行奧地利（ASI / E-Control / APG）、OVE及歐盟CE相關要求。

answer_first.en: For Austria-bound EV chargers, the most critical gaps are Type 2 / CCS2 connector alignment under IEC 62196, compatibility with AFIR obligations as implemented in Austria, CE conformity evidence under LVD / EMC / RED where in scope, RCD / RDC protection, OVE electrotechnical rules, and E-Control / APG installation and grid-operator coordination. 230/400 V 50 Hz parameters are required — voltage differs from China's 220/380 V baseline. Austria is landlocked; sea freight enters via Hamburg, Koper, or Trieste. German-language documentation is commonly expected.
answer_first.zh: 对于奥地利，关键差距包括IEC 62196下Type 2与CCS2接口一致性、奥地利实施下AFIR义务、适用范围内的LVD/EMC/RED合规证据、RCD/RDC保护、OVE电工技术规则，以及E-Control/APG并网/项目协调要求。须以230/400 V、50 Hz参数完成交付准备，电压与中国220/380 V基线不同。奥地利为内陆国，海运经汉堡、科佩尔或的里雅斯特入境，通常须提供德语文件。
answer_first.zht: 對於奧地利，關鍵差距包括IEC 62196下Type 2與CCS2介面一致性、奧地利實施下AFIR義務、適用範圍內的LVD/EMC/RED合規證據、RCD/RDC保護、OVE電工技術規則，以及E-Control/APG併網/專案協調要求。須以230/400 V、50 Hz參數完成交付準備，電壓與中國220/380 V基線不同。奧地利為內陸國，海運經漢堡、科佩爾或的里雅斯特入境，通常須提供德語文件。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, notified body, customs, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
